name: tokenjuice_reduce
description: Run a terminal command and return its output reduced by Tokenjuice. Applies rule-based classification (e.g., git status, npm test, ls, curl) to compact noisy terminal output before it enters the LLM context. Up to 80% token reduction on verbose commands.

command.description: Shell command to execute. Output is captured and reduced.

maxInlineChars.description: Maximum chars to include in the inline result. Larger outputs are truncated with head/tail.

noOmit.description: If true, don't omit lines — show full output.

trace.description: If true, include classification trace (which rule matched, normalized command, etc.).

inlineText.description: Reduced command output suitable for LLM context.

compaction.description: CompactionMetadata describing the reduction strategy used.

handler: import { runReduceJsonCli } from '../../tokenjuice-extracted/tokenjuice-main/dist/index.js'; const result = await runReduceJsonCli({ command: [args.command], cwd: args.cwd }); return result;
